name: Bloom & Vine Studio
description: A premium floral design studio in Boston's Back Bay, known for lush romantic arrangements and garden-inspired installations. Bloom & Vine creates breathtaking floral experiences with an emphasis on seasonal blooms and European-inspired design.

personal_flowers.note: Bouquets and wearable flowers for the wedding party

ceremony_decor.note: Floral installations and decor for the ceremony space

reception_decor.note: Table florals, garlands, and decorative arrangements for the reception

extras.note: Known for breathtaking floral installations and statement pieces

seasonal_availability_notes: Peonies available May-June only. Dahlias August-October. Garden roses year-round but premium pricing in winter.

eco_friendly.donation_partner: Petals for Hope — we donate reception flowers to local hospitals and nursing homes
eco_friendly.note: We use foam-free mechanics on request. Locally sourced seasonal flowers are our default in spring and summer.

consultation_process.note: We start with a free consultation and build a digital mood board. Sample arrangement available before deposit.

cancellation_policy.under_30_days: Full payment required — flowers already ordered from growers

sweeteners: Complimentary toss bouquet with bridal bouquet order
Free flower crown for the bride with orders over $3000
Complimentary boutonniere upgrade to garden rose for full wedding packages
10% off when booking floral and ceremony decor together
Free post-wedding flower donation to Petals for Hope
personality: Artistic, detail-obsessed, and deeply romantic. Bloom & Vine approaches every wedding as a work of art. They invest significant time in consultations and mood boards. Premium pricing reflects their quality, but they are warm and collaborative throughout the process.
